name: Source Chunker
description: A deterministic chunking tool that converts normalized Buddy messages or normalized documents into retrieval-ready chunk candidates without writing storage or queueing embeddings.

inputSchema.name: Strategy
inputSchema.description: conversation_turn_window for messages or document_section_window for normalized documents.

inputSchema.name: Source
inputSchema.description: Normalized source package. For messages, provide session_id and messages. For documents, provide documents.

inputSchema.name: Limits
inputSchema.description: Chunking limits such as max_chars, overlap_chars, overlap_messages, and max_turns_per_chunk.

en-US.name: Source Chunker
en-US.description: Produces deterministic chunk candidates from normalized messages or documents without storage writes.

zh-CN.name: Source Chunker
zh-CN.description: 把规范化消息或文档切成可入库的 chunk candidates，不直接写库或排 embedding job。
